title: Why seniors flee big tech
meta_description: Exit interviews with 22 engineers reveal why senior talent flees big tech in 2026 — decision fatigue, impact erosion, and context switching costs, not salary.
prewritten_tweet:
Most senior engineers who leave Big Tech in 2026 don’t do it for more money.
